FURINA_KEYWORD_ARKHE.title: Arkhe
FURINA_KEYWORD_ARKHE.description: Divided into Ousia and Pneuma. Some cards trigger different effects based on their description color under different Arkhe attributes.
FURINA_KEYWORD_INVITE.title: Invite
FURINA_KEYWORD_INVITE.description: Summon [purple]Salon Member[/purple] or [color=#FFFF00]Singer of Many Waters[/color] at the cost of 3 HP. Re-inviting the same target enhances its effect instead.
FURINA_KEYWORD_OUSIA_PNEUMA.title: [purple]Ousia[/purple][color=#FFFF00]Pneuma[/color]
FURINA_KEYWORD_OUSIA_PNEUMA.description: Effects with different colors than your current [gold]Arkhe[/gold] attribute will not trigger.
FURINA_KEYWORD_TROPE.title: Trope
FURINA_KEYWORD_TROPE.description: After playing, this card enters the [gold]Script[/gold] pile instead of the discard pile. If it also has the [gold]Exhaust[/gold] keyword, it enters the [gold]Script[/gold] pile instead of the exhaust pile.
FURINA_KEYWORD_MOVEMENT.title: Movement
FURINA_KEYWORD_MOVEMENT.description: Initially unplayable. Monitors the energy costs of cards you play. If they match the set sequence, this card becomes playable.
FURINA_KEYWORD_SCRIPT.title: Script
FURINA_KEYWORD_SCRIPT.description: A skill card whose energy cost equals the sum of the energy costs of cards in the script (maximum 3).
